title: choisya × dewitteana
intro: Choisya × dewitteana, also known as Mexican Orange Blossom, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Mexico and California. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are used to treat various health issues such as colds, fever, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Choisya × dewitteana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Choisya × dewitteana include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
